title: Xtra Crispy Argentinian Pear Empanadas
description: Aerated Argentinian empanadas filled with pears and bonito shave, cooked to a crispy perfection in a kadhai, this dish is a low fat friendly meal prep option. It features a cultured twist on traditional empanadas.
instructions: Preheat the kadhai over medium heat with olive oil.
Roll out the empanada dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of pear and bonito shave mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half and press the edges together to seal the empanada.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Cook the empanadas in the kadhai for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden.
Serve the empanadas warm, sprinkled with sugar and salt to taste.
